turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm really struggling in my math class. I just can't seem to grasp the concepts no matter how hard I try.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That sounds really tough. Have you considered talking to your teacher or a tutor for extra help? Sometimes breaking things down into smaller steps can make a big difference.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I've tried that, but it's still not clicking. I feel like such a failure.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's completely normal to feel that way when you're struggling, but remember, everyone has their own pace and strengths. Maybe try looking at the material from a different angle or with someone else.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I just wish I could do better. It's so frustrating.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's understandable to feel frustrated, but don't give up. Keep trying and maybe you can find a way that works for you. You're not alone in this.
